product: AUTO CDC flows for streaming tables in Databricks SQL are generally available
tagline: The FLOW AUTO CDC clause for CREATE STREAMING TABLE in Databricks SQL is now generally available.
what_it_does: The FLOW AUTO CDC clause for CREATE STREAMING TABLE in Databricks SQL is now generally available. Use AUTO CDC to process change data capture (CDC) records from a source into a streaming table, automatically handling out of order records as SCD type 1 or SCD type 2 without the complex logic that MERGE INTO requires. FLOW AUTO CDC, generally available.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.desc: Specify the complete list of columns to include: COLUMNS (userId, name, city).

capabilities.desc: Specify a list of columns to exclude: COLUMNS  EXCEPT (operation, sequenceNum)

capabilities.title: Specify the complete list of
capabilities.desc: Specify the complete list of columns to track: COLUMNS (userId, name, city).

capabilities.title: Specify a list of columns
capabilities.desc: Specify a list of columns to be excluded from tracking: COLUMNS  EXCEPT (operation, sequenceNum)

key_takeaway: The FLOW AUTO CDC clause for CREATE STREAMING TABLE in Databricks SQL is now generally available.
